subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of the worlds and Goal of them that have recognized Thee! I beseech Thee by Thy sovereignty which hath subdued all who are in the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله العالمین و مقصود العارفین اسئلک بسلطانک الذی غلب من فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
